title: A sample page, served from central
description: Nautilus helps learners move from isolated vocabulary to connected meaning. This page keeps the demo lightweight, but the interactions are real: tap a highlighted word for lemma expansion, or test the writing surface with an English n-gram pack already installed on central.

result.text:
Language opens a sentence. Context turns a word into meaning.
Tap a word to explore related ideas and sample lines.
